first_look_result.rational_plan: The instruction requires fixing the authorization gateway bugs across three sub-components: in-memory cache invalidation, SQLite persistence store syncing, and time-skewed validation. The plan is to: (1) Rebuild/run the TS code locally using 'npm test' or the verifier command. (2) Modify 'environment/src/cache.ts' to support wildcard evictions of shape 'field:value'. (3) Ensure blacklist sequence syncs are atomic and sequential in 'environment/src/store.ts'. (4) Compensate token verification with 'skewMs' in 'environment/src/validator.ts'.
